gaps_resolved.resolution: Title: 'Constitución del Proyecto (GesFer.Admin.Back)'. Body: use 'el proyecto' as subject; 'este repositorio (GesFer.Admin.Back)' when explicit identification needed.
Skill frontend-test (SddIA/skills/frontend-test) excluded from this refactorization; do not modify spec.md nor spec.json.
Use explicit Cúmulo/agent reference when conceptual equivalent exists; use 'N/A (GesFer.Admin.Back)' or 'No aplica en este repositorio' when none.
Use 'paths.featurePath (Cúmulo)' and add '(e.g. docs/features/<nombre_feature>/ in this repo)' for clarity.
